evalAfter: (async()=>{const r={};const w=ms=>new Promise(s=>setTimeout(s,ms));const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(btn)btn.click();await w(2500);try{const vj=await fetch('https://levo19.github.io/MOS/version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json());r.version=vj.version;}catch(_){}try{MOS.nav('catalogo')}catch(e){r.navErr=String(e)}await w(6000);const ids=['IDPRO0000063','IDPRO0000001','IDPRO0000010','IDPRO0000020'];let ok=false;for(const id of ids){try{MOS._paso2Abrir([{idCanonico:id,costoNuevo:25,costoAnterior:20}],'TEST-P2');await w(900);const m=document.getElementById('paso2Modal');const sats=m?[...m.querySelectorAll('[style*="border-left:2px solid"]')]:[];if(sats.length){r.canonUsado=id;r.satelites=sats.length;r.satTxt=sats.slice(0,5).map(e=>e.textContent.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim());r.stepper=[...m.querySelectorAll('span')].map(s=>(s.textContent||'').trim()).filter(t=>/Paso [12]/.test(t)).slice(0,3);r.cta=(m.querySelector('button[onclick*=_paso2AplicarAutos]')||{}).textContent.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();ok=true;break;}if(m)m.remove();}catch(e){r['err_'+id]=String(e)}}if(!ok)r.nota='ninguno de los ids de prueba tenia satelites';return r;})()
